creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:51:31 2014
New Revision: 353426
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353426
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353426/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/189338
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/graphics/p5-Imager-Plot/Makefile

Modified: head/graphics/p5-Imager-Plot/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/graphics/p5-Imager-Plot/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:51:27 2014	(r353425)
+++ head/graphics/p5-Imager-Plot/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:51:31 2014	(r353426)
@@ -8,9 +8,12 @@ CATEGORIES=	graphics perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl extension for generating fancy graphic plots in color
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Imager>=0:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/p5-Imager
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
